title: Acts of the Apostles (Ge'ez)
description: The Ethiopian version of the Acts of the Apostles, with additional material about the apostles' missions to Ethiopia and the conversion of the Ethiopian eunuch.
introduction: The Ethiopian version of the Acts of the Apostles, with additional material about the apostles' missions to Ethiopia and the conversion of the Ethiopian eunuch.

translation.text: And Philip ran to the chariot of the Ethiopian eunuch, who was reading Isaiah the prophet, and said: 'Do you understand what you are reading?'
